evals.name: form-search-input
evals.prompt: Add a 'search by serial number' input and label to the top of the bikes index page. It should be a simple form that submits to the existing search action. Show me the modified view and any new partial/component you'd add.
evals.expected_output: ERB/view code using twinput class on the input, twlabel on the label, and tw: prefix on any Tailwind utility classes.

evals.name: profile-stat-row
evals.prompt: On the user profile page, show the user's total registered bikes count and the sum of all bike values they own. Style it like a stat row at the top of the page.
evals.expected_output: ERB/view code using the number_display helper for both numbers, with tw: prefix on Tailwind classes.

evals.name: bike-card-component
evals.prompt: Create a new BikeCardComponent that takes a bike and renders the manufacturer, year, frame_model, and value. Use it on the bikes index page in place of whatever partial is currently rendering each bike.
evals.expected_output: A ViewComponent with keyword-argument initializer, instance variables (no attr_accessor), helpers. prefix in the template, number_display for year/value, tw: prefix on Tailwind classes.

evals.name: notifications-dropdown
evals.prompt: Build a notifications dropdown for the navbar — bell icon with an unread count badge, click to expand a panel showing recent notifications. Should close when clicked outside.
evals.expected_output: Stimulus controller (not CoffeeScript), tw: prefix on Tailwind classes, number_display for the unread count, ViewComponent if structured as a component.
